skills.name: Whirlwind Strike
skills.description: A spinning strike that hits all nearby enemies.

tiers.1: Base skill unlocked. Simple animation, base damage.
tiers.2: Choose: wider area OR concentrated damage on one target.
tiers.3: Choose: bleed on hit OR shockwave at end OR pull to center.
tiers.4: Choose: becomes a movement skill OR summons a spectral clone.
